zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Preston於1361年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯時，她的父親Sir Christopher Preston 2nd Baron Gormanston7歲，母親Elizabeth de Loundres4歲。她於大約1380年與Thomas Fleming "Flandrensis"在愛爾蘭庫迪 懷可福德可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世在愛爾蘭庫迪 科克尤加爾，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 科克尤加爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Preston于1361年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯时，她的父亲Sir Christopher Preston 2nd Baron Gormanston7岁，母亲Elizabeth de Loundres4岁。她于大约1380年与Thomas Fleming "Flandrensis"在爱尔兰庫迪 懷可福德可瓦爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世在爱尔兰庫迪 科克尤加爾，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 科克尤加爾。

nameMeanings.name: Preston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from one of the many places (most notably one in Lancashire) so called from Old English prēost ‘priest’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.
occasionally from Middle English prest + son ‘son of the priest’. Priests were forbidden marriage but many produced illegitimate offspring.

variants.name: Presson
meanings: English (Cheshire and Lancashire): variant of   Preston  .
French: occupational name for a presser of wine or oil, from a derivative of presser ‘to press’.

variants.name: Prestwich
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from a place in Lancashire (now Greater Manchester), so called from Old English prēost ‘priest’ + wīc ‘outlying settlement’, or from other places with the same derivation. Variants such as Prestidge, Prestage, etc., parallel the local pronunciation of the Lancashire name. Compare Preston .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Preston was born in 1361, in County Meath, Ireland, her father, Sir Christopher Preston 2nd Baron Gormanston, was 7 and her mother, Elizabeth de Loundres, was 4. She married Thomas Fleming "Flandrensis" about 1380, in Cornwall, County Wexford, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in Youghal, County Cork, Ireland, and was buried in Youghal, County Cork, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Preston est née en 1361, à County Meath, Irlande, son père, Sir Christopher Preston 2nd Baron Gormanston, avait 7 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Loundres, avait 4 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Fleming "Flandrensis" environ 1380, à Cornwall, County Wexford, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée à Youghal, County Cork, Irlande, et a été enterrée à Youghal, County Cork, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Preston 1361 in County Meath, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Christopher Preston 2nd Baron Gormanston 7 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth de Loundres 4. Sie hat um 1380 in Cornwall, County Wexford, Irland Thomas Fleming "Flandrensis" geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb in Youghal, County Cork, Irland und wurde in Youghal, County Cork, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Preston è nata il nel 1361 nel County Meath, Irlanda, sua padre, Sir Christopher Preston 2nd Baron Gormanston, aveva 7 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth de Loundres, aveva 4 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Fleming "Flandrensis" circa 1380, nel Cornwall, County Wexford, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel Youghal, County Cork, Irlanda, e fu sepolta a Youghal, County Cork, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Prestonが1361年にアイルランドコウントイ メアスで生まれた時，父Sir Christopher Preston 2nd Baron Gormanstonは7歳，母Elizabeth de Loundresは4歳であった。約1380年にアイルランドコウントイ ウエクスフォードコルンワルでThomas Fleming "Flandrensis"と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女はアイルランドコウントイ コルクイオウアルで死去し，アイルランドコウントイ コルクイオウアルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Preston(이)가 1361년 아일랜드 카운티 미스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Christopher Preston 2nd Baron Gormanston(은)는 7세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth de Loundres(은)는 4세였다. 그녀는 대략 1380년 아일랜드 카운티 w스퍼드 코른월에서 Thomas Fleming "Flandrensis"(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 아일랜드 카운티 코르크 요우그할에서 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 코르크 요우그할에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Preston nasceu em 1361, em County Meath, Irlanda, seu pai, Sir Christopher Preston 2nd Baron Gormanston, tinha 7 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Loundres, tinha 4 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Fleming "Flandrensis" aproximadamente 1380, em Cornwall, County Wexford, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em Youghal, County Cork, Irlanda, e foi sepultada em Youghal, County Cork, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Preston родилась в 1361 г. в местности коунти мит, Ирландия, её отцу по имени Sir Christopher Preston 2nd Baron Gormanston было 7 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Loundres, 4. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Fleming "Flandrensis" около 1380 г. в местности корнвалл, коунти вексфорд, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в местности еугэл, коунти корк, Ирландия и была похоронена в местности еугэл, коунти корк, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Preston nació en 1361, en County Meath, Irlanda, su papá, Sir Christopher Preston 2nd Baron Gormanston, tenía 7 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Loundres, tenía 4 años. Se casó con Thomas Fleming "Flandrensis" aproximadamente 1380, en Cornwall, County Wexford, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en Youghal, County Cork, Irlanda, y fue sepultada en Youghal, County Cork, Irlanda.
